features.name: GET / — Dashboard
features.detail: render_dashboard() — project cards, Claude usage strip (today + 30d), agent team table, session log, task column badges.

features.name: GET /hive — Hive page
features.detail: render_hive() — Brain connection badge, ecosystem stats (projects/decisions/features/sessions), agent profiles, recent sessions. Falls back to local JSON when Brain offline.

features.name: GET /health — Health check
features.detail: render_health() — run_health_check() probe for all 11 projects. Table: service status, port open, git, docs, summary, health badge. Action items callout. Auto-reload every 60s.

features.name: GET /board — Kanban board
features.detail: render_board(project_filter) — SortableJS kanban. 4 columns. Per-project filter. Add/delete task forms.

features.name: GET /usage — LLM usage
features.detail: Reads usage_stats. Today strip, daily chart (30d, 3 series), by-project table, by-model table with savings, totals row. Tier comparison.

features.name: GET /services — Services
features.detail: Service management page. TBD — to be confirmed from full route audit.

features.name: GET /tasks — Scheduled Tasks
features.detail: Scheduled tasks page. TBD — to be confirmed from full route audit.

features.name: GET /activity — Activity
features.detail: Activity feed page. TBD — to be confirmed from full route audit.

features.name: GET /logs — Logs
features.detail: Log viewer page. TBD — to be confirmed from full route audit.

features.name: GET /config — Config
features.detail: Configuration page. TBD — to be confirmed from full route audit.

features.name: GET /guide — Guide
features.detail: Guide / onboarding page. TBD — to be confirmed from full route audit.

features.name: GET /project/{name} — Project detail
features.detail: Per-project detail page. Linked from dashboard project cards.

features.name: POST|PATCH|DELETE /api/tasks*
features.detail: Task CRUD API. POST /api/tasks (create), PATCH /api/tasks/:id (move column), DELETE /api/tasks/:id. Persists to tasks.json.

features.name: usage_stats.py — Claude cost tracking
features.detail: Parses ~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl. No API keys — pure local. today() / daily(n) / by_project(n) / by_model(n) / totals(n) / sessions_log(days, limit). Model pricing: Opus $15/75 · Sonnet $3/15 · Haiku $0.80/4 per 1M tokens. Cache read at 10%, write at 125-200%. 30s in-memory cache.

features.name: qi_service.py — autonomous service control
features.detail: restart(service_name) / start() / stop() → bool. Routes through elevation broker (qi_elevate_client). Any Claude session can call this. from engine.common.qi_service import restart.

features.name: qi_elevate_client.py — broker interface
features.detail: Drops JSON command file into C:\QIH\commands\pending\. Waits for result file. Regex whitelist enforced in broker. Client side is fire-and-wait.

features.name: qi_elevate.py — elevation broker service
features.detail: NSSM service QI_Elevate (LocalSystem). Watches pending\ folder. Executes whitelisted commands. Stale-queue purge on startup (>5 min). PID lock at logs/elevation/broker.lock. NSSM AppExit=Restart (3s, 1.5s throttle).

features.name: qi_logger.py — shared logger
features.detail: get_logger(service) — returns a named logger. set_level(), list_services(). Used by dashboard and all engine components.

features.name: hive_report.py — report helpers
features.detail: Report generation helpers for Hive page. TBD — to be confirmed from full module audit.

features.name: brain_online() probe
features.detail: HTTP GET to QI Brain (port 9010). Returns bool. Used by render_hive() for badge and conditional fallback logic.

features.name: get_ecosystem_snapshot()
features.detail: Returns Brain flat schema: active_projects, active_decisions, features_logged, sessions_logged. Falls back to local inference: status.json for projects, session_summary docx count for decisions, tasks.json length for features, usage_stats.sessions_log() for sessions.

features.name: get_agents() + get_agent_profile()
features.detail: Agent list and per-agent detail from Brain. Falls back to C:\QIH\hive\Agents\*/config.json.

features.name: get_recent_sessions()
features.detail: Recent logged sessions from Brain DB. Displayed in dashboard session log widget.

features.name: get_brain_status()
features.detail: Brain API status summary. Used by Hive page header.

features.name: run_health_check() — 11-project probe
features.detail: Checks: path exists on disk, NSSM service status (running/stopped/not_found), port open (TCP), git branch + uncommitted count + last commit, docs currency, session summary docx present. Returns dict per project with health: ok | warning | attention.

features.name: sync_tasks()
features.detail: Helper to synchronise task state. TBD — to be confirmed from module audit.

features.name: status.json — project registry
features.detail: Projects dict: {name: {status, current_task, notes}}. session_log array. Loaded by load_status(). Saved by save_json(STATUS_FILE, data).

features.name: tasks.json — kanban task store
features.detail: tasks array: [{id (uuid), title, description, column, project, agent, priority}]. load_tasks() / save_tasks(). Mutated by /api/tasks CRUD endpoints.

features.name: Agents config (legacy)
features.detail: Per-agent config.json in legacy agents folder (C:\QIH\hive\Agents\). Keys: status, model_default, scope. Folder stays for now; may migrate to Brain DB.

features.name: Static assets
features.detail: AdminLTE CSS (adminlte.min.css), Bootstrap Icons, SortableJS. Mounted at /static by FastAPI StaticFiles.
